StructurePhase.Reference: Wilhelm H.A., Carlson O.N., Dickinson J.M., Trans. Am. Inst. Min. Metall. Pet. Eng., v200 p915 (1954)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 456800. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Nb. Compound Preparation: arc-melted, three-four times remelted. CRUCIBLE: copper hearth. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 1873 K for 4 h. Article Title: Columbium-Vanadium Alloy System. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Dwight A.E., Trans. Am. Inst. Min. Metall. Pet. Eng., v215 p283 (1959)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO. LPF Collection Code: 252223. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: arc-melted. Sample annealed at 1073-1173 K. Article Title: CsCl-Type Equiatomic Phases in Binary Alloys of Transition Elements. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: b a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
